text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process, GruntHTTP.exe (not a standard Windows binary), writes and executes temporary PowerShell scripts, connects to the highly sensitive LSASS pipe (often associated with credential access), and connects to the Workstation Service pipe and WinRM port 5985. This combination of activities is highly suspicious and indicative of potential malicious intent or unauthorized system interaction.",
  "indicators": [
    "LSASS pipe connection",
    "PowerShell script execution",
    "WinRM connection",
    "non-standard executable",
    "temporary file execution"
  ]
}
